{| class="wikitable" style="width:100%; margin-top:1.5em; font-size:90%"
! colspan="2" style="font-size:105%" | [[:Category:The Last Horizon|The Last Horizon]]
|-
| style="white-space:nowrap" | '''Books''' || [[The Captain (novel)|The Captain]] • [[The Engineer (novel)|The Engineer]] • [[The Knight (novel)|The Knight]] • [[The Pilot (novel)|The Pilot]]
|-
| '''Magic''' || [[Spellcraft]]
|-
| '''Browse''' || [[:Category:The Last Horizon characters|Characters]] • [[:Category:The Last Horizon locations|Locations]] • [[:Category:The Last Horizon groups|Groups]] • [[:Category:The Last Horizon events|Events]] • [[:Category:The Last Horizon|Everything]]
|}
